item.title: Scores for 2026-04-03
item.description: Pot limit Omaha Hi-Lo Place User Points 1 Norma1 12,000 2 Maryjean 10,000 3 PaPaLarry 8,000 4 Nana_Sharon 6,000 5 Kevin 4,000 6 bill 2,000 7 JoAnnmeme 1,000 8 patc 500 No limit Omaha Hi-Lo Place User Points 1 patc 12,000 2 bill 10,000 3 Kevin 8,000 4 JoAnnmeme 6,000 5 Nana_Sharon 4,000 6 Maryjean 2,000 7 PaPaLarry 1,000 8 Norma1 500 Larry's Special Place User Points 1 patc 12,000 2 Maryjean 10,000 3 JoAnnmeme 8,000 4 Kevin 6,000 5 PaPaLarry 4,000 6 bill 2,000 7 Nana_Sharon 1,000 8 Norma1 500 Month Point Totals Place User Points 1 patc 24,500 2 Maryjean 22,000 3 Kevin 18,000 4 JoAnnmeme 15,000 5 bill 14,000 6t Norma1 13,000 6t PaPaLarry 13,000 8 Nana_Sharon 11,000
